use_cases: Interactive hero section background with user-triggered plasma ball effects
Decorative landing page animation responding to clicks
Abstract visual loading state with void ball morphing effects
Gaming-inspired interface element with plasma ball creation
Creative portfolio background with organic, interactive motion
ai_summary: A sophisticated SVG-based animation component featuring void and plasma ball effects with gooey-style SVG filters and blend modes. Users click anywhere to spawn plasma balls that animate toward random targets within a gooey circle radius. The animation uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps rendering and creates organic, morphing visual effects using feGaussianBlur and color blending techniques.
